decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (D), review_item (proposal), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (specific — budget constraint note appropriate), timestamp (ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_rosa), route_to (Rosa), sync_to_asana (false). Routing to Rosa for client communication is correct per production routing table.
celia_routing_notes: All 11 fields present. route_to field used correctly. Routes to Rosa for client proposal delivery.
